title: fix(deps): update module tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface to v0.8.0 - autoclosed

| [tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface) | `v0.7.2` -> `v0.8.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.7.2/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.7.2/v0.8.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cncf-tags/container-device-interface (tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v0.8.0`](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v0.8.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.7.2...v0.8.0)

**Breaking change:** The `.ToOCI()` functions in the `specs-go` package have been removed. This removes the dependency on the OCI runtime specification from the CDI specification definition itself.

#### What's Changed

-   Add workflow to mark prs and issues as stale by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/207](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/207)
-   Remove the ToOCI functions from the specs-go package by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/208](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/208)
-   docs: add a pointer to community meetings in our docs. by [@​klihub](https://togithub.com/klihub) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/210](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/210)
-   Bump spec version to v0.8.0 by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/211](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/211)
-   Update spec version in README by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/212](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/212)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.7.2...v0.8.0

</details>

---

### ℹ Artifact update notice

##### File name: go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):


- 1 additional dependency was updated


Details:


| **Package**                                        | **Change**           |
| :------------------------------------------------- | :------------------- |
| `tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface/specs-go` | `v0.7.0` -> `v0.8.0` |

We were not able to find or create Copr project `packit/containers-buildah-5623` specified in the config with the following error:
```
Cannot create a new Copr project (owner=packit project=containers-buildah-5623 chroots=['centos-stream-9-x86_64', 'centos-stream-10-x86_64', 'centos-stream-9-aarch64', 'centos-stream-10-aarch64']): Response is not in JSON format, there is probably a bug in the API code.
```
---
Please check your configuration for:

1. typos in owner and project name (groups need to be prefixed with `@`)
2. whether the project name doesn't contain not allowed characters (only letters, digits, underscores, dashes and dots must be used)
3. whether the project itself exists (Packit creates projects only in its own namespace)
4. whether Packit is allowed to build in your Copr project
5. whether your Copr project/group is not private
